jaghun_allocations.name: Jaghun 1: Document Acquisition & Preparation
jaghun_allocations.objective: Ensure treasury_bulletin_1953_02.pdf is accessible and ready for processing.

jaghun_allocations.name: Jaghun 2: OCR Initiation & Oversight
jaghun_allocations.objective: Initiate the OCR process for the document.

jaghun_allocations.name: Jaghun 3: Raw Text Reception & Validation
jaghun_allocations.objective: Receive the raw text output from OCR and perform initial validation (e.g., check for completeness).

jaghun_allocations.name: Jaghun 4: Data Identification - Expenditure Transfers

jaghun_allocations.objective: Locate and extract relevant data points for Fiscal Year 1947.

title: OfficeQA: CAGR for Old-Age and Survivors Insurance

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] Hundred-household task decomposed into 10 ten-household sub-tasks for OCR, data extraction, and CAGR calculation.

arban_allocations.title: OCR Document: treasury_bulletin_1953_02.pdf
arban_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the provided PDF file (treasury_bulletin_1953_02.pdf) to obtain its full text content.

arban_allocations.title: Initial OCR Text Scan and Review
arban_allocations.description: Review the raw OCR text from the PDF to ensure readability and identify major sections or tables that might contain financial data.

arban_allocations.title: Identify Key Financial Terms
arban_allocations.description: Search the OCR text for keywords like 'Federal Old-Age and Survivors Insurance', 'expenditure transfers', and 'trust fund' to pinpoint relevant sections.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Expenditure Data for FY 1947
arban_allocations.description: Locate and extract the specific numerical value for 'expenditure transfers to the trust fund for Federal Old-Age and Survivors Insurance' for Fiscal Year 1947.

arban_allocations.title: Determine Korean War Start Fiscal Year
arban_allocations.description: Research to precisely identify the U.S. fiscal year during which the Korean War officially began (June 1950).

arban_allocations.title: Extract Expenditure Data for Korean War Start FY
arban_allocations.description: Locate and extract the specific numerical value for 'expenditure transfers to the trust fund for Federal Old-Age and Survivors Insurance' for the identified Korean War start fiscal year.

arban_allocations.title: Data Verification and Cleaning
arban_allocations.description: Cross-reference the extracted financial data (for both FY 1947 and the Korean War start FY) with the original OCR text to ensure accuracy and resolve any ambiguities.

arban_allocations.title: Prepare Data for CAGR Calculation
arban_allocations.description: Consolidate the start value (FY 1947 expenditure), end value (Korean War start FY expenditure), and the number of periods for CAGR formula application.

arban_allocations.title: Calculate Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR)
arban_allocations.description: Apply the Compound Annual Growth Rate formula using the prepared start and end expenditure values and the number of periods.

arban_allocations.title: Format Final Answer
arban_allocations.description: Round the calculated CAGR to two decimal places, convert it to a percentage, and encapsulate it within '<FINAL_ANSWER></FINAL_ANSWER>' tags.

updates.contingency: No contingency plan required at this decomposition stage.

meta.stage_description: 百户级执行并向下分解到十户级。
